description_long: This is a rectangular woven picnic basket with a light beige, natural wicker appearance and a sturdy, structured form. The basket features two wide, dark-colored handles attached to the longer sides, likely made of leather or faux leather, secured with visible metal rivets. The weave is tight and uniform, providing both durability and a classic, rustic aesthetic. The rim of the basket is reinforced with a thicker band of woven material, adding to its structural integrity. The interior is spacious and open, suitable for carrying food, drinks, or other picnic essentials. There are no visible lids, closures, or decorative embellishments beyond the functional handles.
description: A rectangular, tightly woven wicker picnic basket with two wide, dark handles and a reinforced rim. The basket is open-topped and has a natural, rustic appearance.
description_view_0: The basket is seen from the narrow end, showing the depth and the open interior, with both handles visible on the sides.
description_view_1: The basket is viewed from the long side, highlighting one of the wide, dark handles attached with metal rivets and the reinforced rim.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite narrow end, again emphasizing the basket's depth and open interior.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, displaying the other long side with the second wide, dark handle and the same reinforced rim.
attribute_handle_type: Two wide, fixed, dark-colored handles attached to the long sides with metal rivets; likely leather or faux leather.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with uniform horizontal and vertical bands; no decorative variations.
